title: Side effect function inside unsatisfied if condition get executed

features.name: ternary operator with side-effect function calls
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator that selects between two function calls where both functions modify a shared state variable

features.name: if-else with side-effect function calls
features.description: Code should include an if-else where both branches call functions that modify a shared struct state variable via inout parameter

features.name: struct with int field used as function inout parameter
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef with an integer field that is passed by reference (inout) to functions which modify it
